name: Parabolic gapper fade (intraday short, +30% stop) — mined board row 1

pipeline.stage1: Polygon grouped daily adjusted=true; ticker alpha len<=5 not 5-letter-WRU; prev close >=0.75; day high >= 1.20*prev close; day volume >= 500000
pipeline.stage2: Alpaca SIP 5Min+1Day adjustment=split; slice = bars ET start in [09:30,10:25]; readable = >=8 bars AND last >=10:15; P=last slice close; qualifying = P>=1.30*prev_close AND P>=2.00 AND slice volume >= 500000
pipeline.fetch_rule: G1 fetch runs ONLY after this prereg's hash is locked and its ledger entry is PREREGISTERED (gate-zero enforced in code)

signal: qualifying ticker-day AND gain_1030 >= 0.50 AND catalyst != MERGER_ACQ (Alpaca news [prev day 16:00 ET, day 10:30 ET], posthoc_scan keyword classifier verbatim)

execution.entry: short at open of first bar with ET start in [10:30,11:00)
execution.stop: stop_px = entry*1.30; walk post bars: bar.o>=stop -> fill bar.o (gap-through); bar.h>=stop -> fill stop_px
execution.exit: close of last bar ET start < 16:00 if not stopped

costs.borrow_charge: intraday short pays 1 day of schedule (covers locate fees); overnight short pays 2 days
costs.locate_model: deterministic expectation: event weight x0.5; assumed random subset (undetectable selection disclosed)
costs.rider: R1 — no verdict valid under default cost assumptions

sizing_constitutional.daily_net: sum(event_returns)*0.0125*0.50 per day; 0 on no-event days

thresholds.primary: stationary-block-bootstrap one-sided p(mean of DAILY constitutional net series > 0), L=5, 10000 draws, seed 42 (research.modern._lib.block_bootstrap_sharpe_diff_p vs zero arm)
thresholds.family: Benjamini-Hochberg across HYP-093/094/095 primary p-values, alpha=0.05, m=3
thresholds.daily_series: net constitutional return for EVERY trading day in the holdout window (0.0 on no-event days) — the %/day claim is over calendar of opportunity, not event days only
thresholds.tail_condition: event p5 >= -0.60 AND no single event worse than -0.60 (else sizing premise broken -> NOT_ROBUST)

abort: stage-1 holdout cache incomplete -> partial-window truthfully or DATA_INSUFFICIENT
stage-2 usable coverage < 60% of candidates -> DATA_INSUFFICIENT
verdict_ladder: CONFIRMED (all: primary p<0.05, BH survivor, DSR>=0.95, constitutional floor met, tail condition met) / VALID_BUT_BELOW_FLOOR (significance yes, floor no) / NOT_ROBUST (tail/sizing premise violated) / NOT_SIGNIFICANT / DATA_INSUFFICIENT (coverage/abort conditions)
prior_materials: Mining board is NON-EVIDENTIARY. Registered prior: NOT_SIGNIFICANT (operator's stated guess).
